nodes.itemHTML: • Documentation Generatorstars298
• Generic mitigations
• Trunkstars2k - WASM web application bundler for Rust.
• Web Bundlerstars11 - Bundles a Seed SPA for publishing.
• Seederstars44 - Set up Seed app and start dev server by running one command.
• Seed Bootstrapstars2 - A collection of the Bootstrap CSS components.
• GDGotm - GDScript API for gotm.io.
• vue-safe-htmlstars14 - Vue.js directive which renders sanitised HTML dynamically.
• 💼 tailwindcss-railsstars1.1k - Gem for using Tailwind CSS with Rails' asset pipeline.
• Robo Dojo - You build robots that build, corrupt and destroy other robots in an attempt to eliminate all competitors.

• TIS-100 - Open-ended programming game by Zachtronics, the creators of SpaceChem and Infinifactory, in which you rewrite corrupted code segments to repair the TIS-100 and unlock its secrets. It's the assembly language programming game you never asked for!

• Colobot - 3D video game where you program your bots to ride, fly, find, bring, refuel and destroy. Game is using a language called CBOT, similar to C++ and Java. Colobot offers tutorialed campaign with gradually harder tasks or you can play scenarios to challenge your skill.
• She Can Code - An organization with the mission of empower women to enter and remain in the tech industry.

• Vindinium - Players write scripts in the programming language of their choice (optionally using one of the many starter packs) to control a 16-bit hero through HTTP requests, guiding him to collect gold, do battle with other players, and even visit the tavern.
• Robocodestars111 - The goal is to develop a robot battle tank to battle against other tanks. The robot battles are running in real-time and on-screen.
• Robocode - The goal is to develop a robot battle tank to battle against other tanks. The robot battles are running in real-time and on-screen.
• Robocode - The goal is to develop a robot battle tank to battle against other tanks. The robot battles are running in real-time and on-screen.
• Embedded Security CTF - The purpose is to bypass a series of locks, essentially hacking them, in order to get through a series of warehouses.
• Box-256 - Write assembly code to match a shown graphic.
• Robocodestars1 - The goal is to develop a robot battle tank to battle against other tanks in Java or .NET. The robot battles are running in real-time and on-screen.

• Scalatron - Coders pit bot programs (written in Scala) against each other. It is an educational resource for groups of programmers or individuals that want to learn more about the Scala programming language or want to hone their Scala programming skills.

• Shenzhen I/O - You build circuits using a variety of components from different manufacturers, like microcontrollers, memory, and logic gates, and then write code in a compact and powerful assembly language where every instruction can be conditionally executed.

• MHRD - Hardware design game, in which you design various hardware circuits in a hardware description language. The hardware circuits you design get more complex as you go until you create a fully functional CPU design.

• Code Games - Real time programming game where you compete against other players by coding the behaviour of a space ship. The programming language is easy to learn and the game is super fun. Subscribe to one of our tournaments and compete for the prize.
• Mudlet - Game client that allows you to play MUDs (text-only MMORPGs). You can write Lua code in Mudlet to help you play MUDs.
• embedded-nal: An Embedded Network Abstraction Layer -
• embedded-storage: An Embedded Storage Abstraction Layer
• 🍓 FractalTransformerView pluginstars15 - A plugin which allows using Fractal transformers for your API output.

• .NET Community Standup: Meet the Blazor Team - January 12, 2021 - "Meet the Blazor Team"'s .NET Community Standup. Meet the people behind the code! Join us for a fun livestream with members of the Blazor team.
• Microsoft Teams App With Blazor Made Easy Using Blazorade Teams - January 10, 2021 - Microsoft Teams App With Blazor Made Easy Using Blazorade Teams. Source codestars32 .

• How to Use Query Strings in Blazor WebAssembly - January 7, 2021 - In this article, we are going to learn how to use query strings in Blazor WebAssembly. We are going to show you how to send query strings to the Blazor component and also how to read them inside the component. Source codestars2 .
• Introducing Online GZIP de/compressor, built with Blazor WebAssembly - January 1, 2021 - Introducing Online GZIP de/compressor, built with Blazor WebAssembly.
• Librerama - A free/libre fast-paced arcade collection of mini-games.
• SuperStarfighterstars363 - Fast-paced local party game with starships that battle in a top-down arena.
• TuxBuilderstars191 - Work-in-progress reimplementation of SuperTux.
• Blipshiftstars13 - Simple top-down moving platforms game.
• Circle Jumpstars127 - Mobile arcade game, addicting and enjoyable. How-to-made tutorial is available, so you can recreate it yourself and learn Godot.
• Haldricstars372 - Official work-in-progress reimplementation of Battle for Wesnoth.
• SealedBite - 2D platformer game, winner of the GitHub Game Off 2019 jam.
• Unknown Horizonsstars450 - Official work-in-progress reimplementation of Unknown Horizons.
• Breakablestars58 - A breakout-like game.
• Memory Gamestars24 - Simple Memory game.
• BlockPopstars25 - A simple Breakout clone.
• Bombsstars14 - Simple mobile game. You need to touch bombs to defuse them.
• Captain Holetoothstars57 - Explorative platformer in a detailed world. Geared towards younger players.
• Dolphin Island 2stars162 - Platformer game made for the A Game By It's Cover 2015 Game Jam.
• DynaDungeonsstars193 - Bomberman clone in a fantasy universe.
• Kraken-Rampagestars4 - Ludum Dare 33 entry made in 48 hours.
• Minehunterstars13 - A Minesweeper clone.
• Minilens - Free puzzle platform game.
• Mountain of Hopestars11 - Game made on Theater Game Jam (PGA 2015).
• Ninja-Trainingstars34 - Small running game done as 1 hour challenge.
• No hopestars8 - Ludum Dare 33 entry made in 48 hours.
• Planet Riderstars32 - 2D physics parkour game in an alien environment.
• Platshootstars41 - A 2D shooter game.
• Ringedstars76 - Top-down shooter with extensive usage of light effects.
• Tanks of Freedomstars992 - Free turn-based isometric strategy game.
• Three Hungry Micestars4 - Breakout game with mice made for the Godot Engine Jam of March 2016.
• Broken Sealsstars270 - A work-in-progress third person action RPG with multiplayer support (needs custom engine modules).
• Super Tux Party - A free/libre and open-source party game that is meant to replicate the feel of games such as Mario Party.
• Thrivestars1.8k - A free, open-source game about the evolution of life (Mono).
• Rapid Rescuestars61 - Rapid Rescue is a local multiplayer strategy game inspired by Labyrinth.
• Meteoritestars277 - A lowres metroidvania FPS, inspired by Metroid Prime, made for LOWREZJAM 2018.
• Cheese Hunterstars14 - A game for Godot Engine Jam of March 2016.

• Godellostars550 - A Trello-like kanban board application made with Godot. A proof of concept for complex non-game applications with Godot, as well real-time online interactions between multiple users. Includes backend code.
• Material Makerstars2k - Create PBR materials procedurally (similar to Substance Designer).
• Pixeloramastars3.7k - 2D pixel art editor.
• First Person Starterstars285 - Template with First Person Controller, easily adjustable from the Inspector.
• Minimum Gamestars43 - Template top-down 2D pixel art game, with multiple rooms, a HUD, menus, and autosaving.
• Multiplayer First Person Shooterstars54 - Multiplayer first person shooter example project.
• Multiplayer Third Person Shooterstars52 - Multiplayer third person shooter example project.
• Godot-GameTemplatestars747 - Template with all necessary stuff taken care of. Designed for pixel art games.
• The Towerstars12 - A voxel-based parkour game to show the capabilities of the Voxelman module.
• Realistic Water Shaderstars396 - Realistic 3D water shader with foam and caustics.
• OpenRPGstars1.2k - JRPG-style game demo and template.
• voxelgamestars304 - Minecraft-like voxel terrain demo, utilising the godot_voxel module.
• Open Source A-RPG Demostars841 - RPG demo.
• FPS Teststars58 - A singleplayer FPS test. Physics work, but there are no enemies and no proper shooting.
• Pathfinding 2dstars65 - A demo project demonstrating pathfinding using a tilemap.
• UDP Snapshot interpolationstars59 - Lets you connect to a server and view networked physics.
• UDP State synchronizationstars139 - A more efficient networking demo than the snapshot interpolation one.
• Voxel Gamestars67 - Minecraft-like voxel terrain demo.
• GodotPhoenixChannelsstars200 - A GDScript and Godot Engine implementation for the Channels API of the Phoenix Framework (Godot 3.*).
• GodotTIEstars265 - Text Interface Engine to control text output (like in a RPG dialogue) (Godot 2.x, 3.x).
• gtermstars87 - GUI control that draws something similar to *nix terminal emulators (Godot >= 2.1).
• GUTstars1k - Utility for writing unit tests in GDScript (Godot 3.x).
• InGridstars72 - Infinite scrolling grid (Godot 3.x).
• Tiled importerstars665 - Import maps from Tiled (Godot 3.x).
• TileSet Builderstars12 - Quickly build tilesets with style (Godot 3.x).
• Cartographerstars354 - Heightmap-based 3D terrain editor.
• Delaunator GDScriptstars56 - A GDScript library for Delaunay triangulation of 2D points.
• GDGIFExporterstars78 - GIF exporter made entirely in GDScript.
• GitHub integrationstars203 - Interact with GitHub without opening your browser.
• godotccdstars52 - Fast 3D collision checks in Godot using libccd.
• godotdetourstars114 - A GDNative implementation of the detour/detourcrowd library.
• Godot NExtstars733 - A set of basic node extensions.
• Godot Mixing Deskstars514 - Make procedural sound and adaptive/procedural music with a few nodes and a couple lines of code.
• GodotRxstars63 - Reactive extensions for Godot C# (Mono).
• Godot-Trail-Systemstars264 - Advanced 2D/3D trail system.
• Level of Detail (LOD)stars182 - Level of detail add-on for meshes, lights and particles. Can improve performance in large scenes.
• MDFrameworkstars68 - A C# multiplayer framework with additional tools (Mono).
• Mitigate-IKstars4 - Mitigates the scaling effects of SkeletonIK.
• NI mate Motion Capturestars28 - Animate Skeletons with a Microsoft Kinect sensor.
• Qodotstars766 - Quake .map file support for Godot. Lets you use TrenchBroom for level design.
• UI Design Toolstars233 - Intuitive design workflow for UIs in the editor.
• Volumetricsstars256 - Voxel-based volumetric lighting and fog plugin.
• VPainterstars320 - 3D vertex painting plugin.
• Waterwaysstars592 - Tool to generate river meshes with flow and foam maps based on Bézier curves.
• Yume Visual Novel Editorstars85 - An integrated editor for creating visual novel games.
• FMOD GDNativestars148 - Plugin to use the FMOD audio engine in GDScript.
• gdstatsstars31 - A library of pseudorandom number generators for common statistical distributions.
• Auto Tile Layerstars28 - Allows automatic 2D tiling using RPG Maker's Autotile format.
• Grass Pluginstars61 - A plugin to handle huge amounts of grass, foliages and other vegetations.
• SUTjoystick - Easy gamepad support for GNU/Linux and Windows.
